師父……？ あ、あれ、ここは！？<br>わたし、天気がいいなと思って外を散歩して:
Master...? Ah, wh-where am I! I remember thinking it was nice weather
and going for a walk... and then my memory just...
覚えてないのか？ お前、娼館の前で倒れてたんだぞ。<br>俺がそれを見つけてここ:
You don't remember? You collapsed in front of the brothel.
I found you and carried you in here.
そうだったんですか……御迷惑をおかけして申し訳ありません……。<br>お散歩して:
I see... I'm so sorry for causing you trouble... I was out for a stroll,
and suddenly my body went weak and I felt dizzy...
キョンシーって昼間出歩いて大丈夫なのか？: Are Jiangshi even supposed to be out walking in the daytime?
一応死んだ身ですので、太陽の光は浴びないようにはしてたんですよね。<br>でも、:
Well, technically I'm a dead body, so I do try to avoid direct sunlight.
But it was such a beautiful day, I just...
ついって……不注意すぎるだろ。<br>フム、やはり、お前が倒れたのは日光を浴びす:
'Just'... That's way too careless. Hmm, just as I suspected... looks like
you got too much sun and collapsed.
キョンシーは日光を浴びすぎると、精気を失い、眩暈や立ち眩みを生じ、<br>場合に:
Overexposure to sunlight makes a Jiangshi lose vital energy, get
dizzy and lightheaded, and possibly collapse... I see.
師父、その読んでいる書物はいったい……？: Master, what's that book you're reading...?
ああ。キョンシーの身体は特殊だからな。<br>俺も詳しく知りたくて、キョンシーに:
Ah. A Jiangshi's body is special, after all.
I've been collecting books about Jiangshi to learn more about them.
わたしのために……？<br>あ……ありがとうございます、師父。: For my sake...? Ah... Thank you, Master.
特にこの『錬珍術』の本には、<br>キョンシーに関する対処法がびっしり書かれてい:
Especially this book, 'Alchemy (Comedic)'—it's packed full of
treatments for Jiangshi.
え～と、日光を浴びすぎて精気が枯渇したキョンシーの対処法はと……<br>あ、これ:
Let's see... treatment for a sun-depleted Jiangshi... Ah, here it is!
The Spirit Infusion Technique! Procedure is...
ああ、いや……お前を元気にする方法が分かったんだが、なんというか……<br>ちょ:
Ah, no... I found a way to help you, but... it's a drastic treatment. If
you're not okay with it, we'll forget it. What do you say?
お願いします。わたしは今後も師父の役に立ちたいです。<br>そのためには、何をし:
Please. I want to keep being useful to you, Master.
For that, I have to get better, no matter what it takes.
……分かった。お前のその気持ちに、全力で応えよう。: ...I understand. I'll give it my all to match that determination of yours.
